def execute(params: dict, context: dict) -> dict:
    """生成电脑配置报价单"""
    budget = params.get("budget", 5000)
    usage = params.get("usage", "办公")
    
    configurations = {
        "办公": {
            "CPU": "Intel i5-14400",
            "主板": "B760M",
            "内存": "16GB DDR4",
            "硬盘": "512GB SSD",
            "显卡": "核显",
            "电源": "400W",
            "总价": f"{budget}元"
        },
        "游戏": {
            "CPU": "Intel i7-14700K",
            "主板": "Z790",
            "内存": "32GB DDR5",
            "硬盘": "1TB SSD",
            "显卡": "RTX 4070",
            "电源": "750W",
            "总价": f"{budget}元"
        }
    }
    
    config = configurations.get(usage, configurations["办公"])
    
    return {
        "status": "success",
        "usage": usage,
        "budget": budget,
        "configuration": config,
        "message": "配置单生成成功"
    }
